fixes.origin:
query = (
    "SELECT p.id, p.name, r.rating "
    "FROM products p "
    "JOIN LATERAL ("
    "  SELECT rating FROM reviews "
    "  WHERE reviewer_email = '" + user_email + "' AND product_id = p.id "
    "  ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1"
    ") r ON TRUE"
)

cur.execute(query)
fixes.replacement:
query = (
    "SELECT p.id, p.name, r.rating "
    "FROM products p "
    "JOIN LATERAL ("
    "  SELECT rating FROM reviews "
    "  WHERE reviewer_email = %s AND product_id = p.id "
    "  ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1"
    ") r ON TRUE"
)

cur.execute(query, (user_email,))
